allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''test_scenes.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); [print\(f''\\n场景{s[""scene_id""]}: {s[""shot_type""]}\\n描述: {s[""description""]}\\n主体: {s.get\(""action_subject""\)}\\n动作: {s.get\(""action_verb""\)}\\n对象: {s.get\(""action_target""\)}''\) for s in data[8:12]]")
